## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (`make test`)
- [ ] Static analysis passes (`make phpstan`)
- [ ] Code style checked (`make lint`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] Conventional Commits format used (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
